item.title: Mission Complete
item.description: After setbacks and effort, the job is finally done. What steps sealed the success of this recovery mission?

media:content.media:title: Mission Complete
media:content.media:description: After setbacks and effort, the job is finally done. What steps sealed the success of this recovery mission?

item.title: Off-Road Recovery
item.description: When vehicles stray off the beaten path, recovery gets tricky. What challenges make off‑road rescues so demanding, and how do crews bring them back safely?

media:content.media:title: Off-Road Recovery
media:content.media:description: When vehicles stray off the beaten path, recovery gets tricky. What challenges make off‑road rescues so demanding, and how do crews bring them back safely?

item.title: Dump Truck Crash & Dash
item.description: A dump truck crash sets off chaos on the road. How did the crew respond to the sudden dash for recovery, and what obstacles made it such a high‑stakes job?

media:content.media:title: Dump Truck Crash & Dash
media:content.media:description: A dump truck crash sets off chaos on the road. How did the crew respond to the sudden dash for recovery, and what obstacles made it such a high‑stakes job?

item.title: This Car Was a Mess
item.description: What looked like a hopeless wreck slowly transforms under careful hands. How do you take a car from disaster to drive‑ready, and what surprises lurk beneath the mess?

media:content.media:title: This Car Was a Mess
media:content.media:description: What looked like a hopeless wreck slowly transforms under careful hands. How do you take a car from disaster to drive‑ready, and what surprises lurk beneath the mess?

item.title: A Two People Job
item.description: Some tasks demand more than one set of hands. What made this recovery a true two‑person challenge, and how did teamwork get the job done?

media:content.media:title: A Two People Job
media:content.media:description: Some tasks demand more than one set of hands. What made this recovery a true two‑person challenge, and how did teamwork get the job done?

item.title: Large Tractor Stuck in a Significant Ditch!
item.description: When a big tractor gets trapped in a deep ditch, recovery is no small task. How do we tackle the heavy lift and get it back on solid ground?

media:content.media:title: Large Tractor Stuck in a Significant Ditch!
media:content.media:description: When a big tractor gets trapped in a deep ditch, recovery is no small task. How do we tackle the heavy lift and get it back on solid ground?

item.title: 40‑Foot Shipping Container Job
item.description: A massive 40‑foot container project takes shape in the workshop. What challenges and heavy‑duty solutions make this job stand out?

media:content.media:title: 40‑Foot Shipping Container Job
media:content.media:description: A massive 40‑foot container project takes shape in the workshop. What challenges and heavy‑duty solutions make this job stand out?

item.title: The Snow Storm Hits
item.description: When winter weather strikes, recovery work gets tougher by the minute. What challenges did the storm throw into the mix, and how did the team push through the chaos?

media:content.media:title: The Snow Storm Hits
media:content.media:description: When winter weather strikes, recovery work gets tougher by the minute. What challenges did the storm throw into the mix, and how did the team push through the chaos?

item.title: The Recovery That Refused to Go Right
item.description: Every step seemed to fight back. What went wrong in a recovery that just wouldn’t cooperate?

media:content.media:title: The Recovery That Refused to Go Right
media:content.media:description: Every step seemed to fight back. What went wrong in a recovery that just wouldn’t cooperate?
